nodes.name: quant_type.rs
nodes.summary: Defines the QuantType u8 enum discriminator for QUANT_SEG payloads (Scalar, Product, BinaryThreshold, ResidualPq) with TryFrom<u8> validation.

nodes.name: QuantType
nodes.summary: u8-repr enum of quantization methods used in QUANT_SEG: Scalar(0), Product(1), BinaryThreshold(2), ResidualPq(3).

nodes.name: refcount.rs
nodes.summary: Implements REFCOUNT_SEG (0x21) 32-byte RefcountHeader for tracking cluster reference counts, enabling safe snapshot deletion and GC per ADR-031.

nodes.name: RefcountHeader
nodes.summary: 32-byte repr(C) header carrying magic, version, refcount_width, cluster_count, max_refcount, array_offset, and snapshot_epoch; serializes little-endian.

nodes.name: REFCOUNT_MAGIC
nodes.summary: Magic number 'RVRC' (0x52565243) identifying a REFCOUNT_SEG payload.

nodes.name: security.rs
nodes.summary: ADR-033 security policy and error types: SecurityPolicy mount enforcement (default Strict), SecurityError diagnostics, and the 96-byte HardeningFields manifest block.

nodes.name: SecurityPolicy
nodes.summary: Mount enforcement policy controlling signature/hardening checks. Defaults to Strict.

nodes.name: SecurityError
nodes.summary: Structured failure reasons emitted when mandatory manifest signature/hardening validation fails.

nodes.name: HardeningFields
nodes.summary: 96-byte repr(C) block holding policy flags, signature algorithm, signer key id and other hardening metadata.

nodes.name: segment.rs
nodes.summary: 64-byte SegmentHeader struct — the universal RVF segment preamble carrying type, flags, sizes, and content hash.

nodes.name: SegmentHeader
nodes.summary: Fixed 64-byte segment preamble used by every RVF segment type; carries magic, type, version, sizes, and content hash.

nodes.name: segment_type.rs
nodes.summary: SegmentType u8 discriminator enumerating all RVF segment kinds (VEC, INDEX, QUANT, WASM, REFCOUNT, WITNESS, etc.) with TryFrom<u8>.

nodes.name: SegmentType
nodes.summary: u8-repr enumeration of all RVF segment-type codes.

nodes.name: sha256.rs
nodes.summary: Pure no_std FIPS 180-4 SHA-256 and RFC 2104 HMAC-SHA256 implementation with zero dependencies; verified against NIST test vectors.

nodes.name: Sha256
nodes.summary: Streaming SHA-256 hasher state (8-word digest, 512-bit block buffer).

nodes.name: sha256
nodes.summary: One-shot SHA-256 of an input slice returning the 32-byte digest.

nodes.name: hmac_sha256
nodes.summary: RFC 2104 HMAC-SHA256 of (key, message) producing a 32-byte authentication tag.

nodes.name: ct_eq
nodes.summary: Constant-time equality comparison over two 32-byte digests to prevent timing side channels.

nodes.name: signature.rs
nodes.summary: SignatureAlgo identifiers and SignatureFooter struct describing the trailing signature appended to signed RVF files.

nodes.name: SignatureAlgo
nodes.summary: u16-repr enumeration of supported manifest signature algorithms with TryFrom<u16> parser.

nodes.name: SignatureFooter
nodes.summary: Footer carrying the chosen signature algorithm, key id, and the signature bytes appended to an RVF file.

nodes.name: wasm_bootstrap.rs
nodes.summary: WASM_SEG (0x10) types enabling self-bootstrapping RVF files: 64-byte WasmHeader, WasmRole/WasmTarget enums, and feature-flag constants.

nodes.name: WasmRole
nodes.summary: Role of an embedded WASM module: Interpreter, Microkernel, or Combined — determines bootstrap chain resolution.

nodes.name: WasmTarget
nodes.summary: Target ABI/profile a WASM module is compiled for (wasm32-unknown, wasm32-wasi, etc.).

nodes.name: WasmHeader
nodes.summary: Fixed 64-byte header describing an embedded WASM module: magic, role, target, feature bitmask, bytecode size, bootstrap priority.

nodes.name: WASM_MAGIC
nodes.summary: Magic 0x5256_574D ('RVWM') marking a WASM_SEG payload.

nodes.name: witness.rs
nodes.summary: ADR-035 witness bundle types: 64-byte WitnessHeader, TLV section tag constants, TaskOutcome/GovernanceMode/PolicyCheck enums, ToolCallEntry, and Scorecard.

nodes.name: TaskOutcome
nodes.summary: Result classification for a witnessed task execution (success, partial, failure, etc.).

nodes.name: GovernanceMode
nodes.summary: Governance regime under which the witnessed task ran (e.g., autonomous, supervised, sandbox).

nodes.name: PolicyCheck
nodes.summary: Policy gate evaluation outcome recorded inside a witness bundle.

nodes.name: WitnessHeader
nodes.summary: 64-byte witness bundle header with magic, flags, governance, scorecard and TLV-section offsets.

nodes.name: ToolCallEntry
nodes.summary: 32-byte fixed-size record of a single tool invocation captured in the witness trace.

nodes.name: Scorecard
nodes.summary: Aggregate evaluation metrics (correctness, cost, latency, policy compliance) embedded in a witness bundle.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Manifest for rvf-wasm — a cdylib WASM microkernel crate targeting wasm32, depending on rvf-types, rvf-crypto, and dlmalloc; release profile tuned for size (opt-level z, LTO, strip).

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documentation for the rvf-wasm microkernel crate.

nodes.name: alloc_setup.rs
nodes.summary: Installs dlmalloc as the WASM global allocator and exposes rvf_alloc/rvf_free C ABI functions for JS interop memory management.

nodes.name: rvf_alloc
nodes.summary: Exported extern "C" allocator that returns a heap pointer (as i32) for JS callers to fill.

nodes.name: rvf_free
nodes.summary: Exported extern "C" deallocator releasing a previously-allocated heap region.

nodes.name: bootstrap.rs
nodes.summary: Self-bootstrapping WASM_SEG loader: discovers embedded WASM modules, sorts them by priority, and resolves the Interpreter→Microkernel→Combined bootstrap chain.

nodes.name: WasmRole
nodes.summary: Local mirror of WasmRole used by the WASM-side parser (Interpreter/Microkernel/Combined).

nodes.name: WasmModule
nodes.summary: Descriptor for a single discovered WASM_SEG: role, bytecode offset, length, and bootstrap priority.

nodes.name: BootstrapChain
nodes.summary: Resolved bootstrap chain variant: SingleCombined, InterpreterPlusMicrokernel, MicrokernelOnly, or None.

nodes.name: parse_wasm_module
nodes.summary: Parses a 64-byte WasmHeader from a segment buffer and returns the WasmModule descriptor, validating magic and bounds.

nodes.name: resolve_bootstrap_chain
nodes.summary: Top-level entry that scans all segments, parses WASM_SEG headers, and returns the resolved BootstrapChain.

nodes.name: get_bytecode
nodes.summary: Borrows the raw WASM bytecode slice for a given WasmModule from the backing buffer.

nodes.name: distance.rs
nodes.summary: Scalar fallbacks for vector similarity metrics (L2/IP/cosine over fp16, Hamming, L2 over i8); SIMD v128 reserved for future work.

nodes.name: l2_fp16
nodes.summary: Computes squared L2 distance between two fp16-packed vectors via pointer + dim.

nodes.name: ip_fp16
nodes.summary: Computes inner product between two fp16-packed vectors.

nodes.name: cosine_fp16
nodes.summary: Computes cosine distance between two fp16-packed vectors with explicit norm handling.

nodes.name: hamming
nodes.summary: Computes Hamming distance over byte-packed binary vectors.

nodes.name: l2_i8
nodes.summary: Computes squared L2 distance between two i8-quantized vectors.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Crate root for the rvf-wasm microkernel: declares submodules and exports 14+ #[no_mangle] extern "C" functions covering init/query/topK/PQ/HNSW/store/parse for browser and edge runtimes.

nodes.name: rvf_init
nodes.summary: Initializes the tile configuration block in DATA_MEMORY from a JS-provided config pointer.

nodes.name: rvf_load_query
nodes.summary: Loads a query vector into the SIMD scratch region for subsequent distance calls.

nodes.name: rvf_load_block
nodes.summary: Loads a batch of vectors (typed by dtype) into the SIMD compute block.

nodes.name: rvf_distances
nodes.summary: Computes distances from the loaded query to every vector in the current block under the selected metric.

nodes.name: rvf_topk_merge
nodes.summary: Merges a (distance, id) array into the static top-K min-heap.

nodes.name: rvf_topk_read
nodes.summary: Reads the sorted top-K results out of the heap into a caller-provided buffer.

nodes.name: rvf_load_sq_params
nodes.summary: Loads scalar-quantization (min/scale) parameters for the current dimension.

nodes.name: rvf_dequant_i8
nodes.summary: Dequantizes a batch of i8-quantized vectors back to f32 using the loaded SQ params.

nodes.name: rvf_load_pq_codebook
nodes.summary: Loads an M×K PQ codebook into the SIMD PQ table region for ADC computation.

nodes.name: rvf_pq_distances
nodes.summary: Computes PQ asymmetric distances for a batch of code arrays against the loaded codebook.

nodes.name: rvf_load_neighbors
nodes.summary: Loads a node's neighbor list at a given HNSW layer into the neighbor cache.

nodes.name: rvf_greedy_step
nodes.summary: Performs one greedy graph-search step at a given HNSW layer and returns the next best node id.

nodes.name: rvf_verify_header
nodes.summary: Verifies an RVF file header (magic, version, size) at the given memory pointer.

nodes.name: rvf_crc32c
nodes.summary: Computes CRC32C over a buffer for legacy checksum compatibility.

nodes.name: rvf_store_create
nodes.summary: Creates a new in-memory WasmStore with the given dimension and metric, returning a handle.

nodes.name: rvf_store_open
nodes.summary: Opens an existing RVF buffer as a WasmStore, returning a handle.

nodes.name: rvf_store_ingest
nodes.summary: Inserts a batch of vectors and their ids into a WasmStore identified by handle.

nodes.name: rvf_store_query
nodes.summary: Runs a top-K nearest-neighbor query against a WasmStore.

nodes.name: rvf_store_delete
nodes.summary: Deletes vectors by id from a WasmStore.

nodes.name: rvf_store_export
nodes.summary: Serializes a WasmStore back into an RVF buffer for JS-side persistence.

nodes.name: rvf_parse_header
nodes.summary: Parses the top-level RVF header from a buffer into a caller-provided output region.

nodes.name: rvf_segment_count
nodes.summary: Returns the number of segments in an RVF buffer.

nodes.name: rvf_segment_info
nodes.summary: Returns metadata for segment idx (type, offset, size) from an RVF buffer.

nodes.name: rvf_verify_checksum
nodes.summary: Verifies the checksum/content hash for every segment in an RVF buffer.

nodes.name: rvf_witness_verify
nodes.summary: Verifies a witness chain provided as a flat buffer.

nodes.name: memory.rs
nodes.summary: Allocator-free static memory layout for the Cognitum tile: declares DATA_MEMORY and SIMD_SCRATCH arrays plus byte offsets for tile config, query scratch, results, routing, decode, message IO, neighbor cache, and PQ tables.

nodes.name: segment.rs
nodes.summary: WASM-side segment parsing helpers: parse_segments walks an RVF buffer and returns SegmentInfo records; also exposes header parsing and CRC32C verification.

nodes.name: SegmentInfo
nodes.summary: Lightweight record describing a parsed segment (type, offset, size) for the WASM bootstrap loader.

nodes.name: parse_segments
nodes.summary: Iterates an RVF buffer validating SEGMENT_MAGIC and returning a Vec<SegmentInfo> of every segment.

nodes.name: parse_header_to_buf
nodes.summary: Parses the file header from a buffer and writes the fixed-layout result to a raw output pointer for JS.

nodes.name: verify_crc32c
nodes.summary: Verifies CRC32C of a buffer against an expected value; returns 1 on match, 0 otherwise.

nodes.name: store.rs
nodes.summary: In-memory WasmStore providing a handle-based create/ingest/query/delete/export vector store for browser-side RVF operations, with a global StoreRegistry.

nodes.name: Metric
nodes.summary: Distance metric selector for a WasmStore (L2, IP, cosine, Hamming).

nodes.name: VecEntry
nodes.summary: Single (id, vector) record stored inside a WasmStore.

nodes.name: WasmStore
nodes.summary: In-memory vector store with create/ingest/query/delete/export methods, parameterised by dimension and metric.

nodes.name: StoreRegistry
nodes.summary: Process-global registry mapping integer handles to WasmStore instances for the C ABI exports.

nodes.name: registry
nodes.summary: Returns the mutable singleton StoreRegistry, initialising it lazily.

nodes.name: topk.rs
nodes.summary: Allocator-free fixed-size (K=16) min-heap stored in static memory for top-K result tracking inside the WASM microkernel.

nodes.name: heap_reset
nodes.summary: Clears the static heap state before a new query.

nodes.name: heap_insert
nodes.summary: Inserts a (distance, id) pair into the bounded top-K heap, evicting the worst when full.

nodes.name: heap_read_sorted
nodes.summary: Reads the heap contents in sorted order into a caller-provided output buffer.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Manifest for rvf-wire — the zero-copy segment serialization crate; depends on rvf-types, xxhash-rust, crc32c, sha3, and subtle for constant-time comparisons.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documentation for the rvf-wire reader/writer crate.

nodes.name: delta.rs
nodes.summary: Delta encoding with restart points for sorted u64 id sequences; restart_interval entries are stored absolute so the middle of a sequence can be decoded without a full scan.

nodes.name: encode_delta
nodes.summary: Varint-encodes a sorted id slice using delta coding with periodic restart points.

nodes.name: decode_delta
nodes.summary: Decodes a delta-encoded buffer back into a Vec<u64> using restart_interval for absolute resets.

nodes.name: hash.rs
nodes.summary: Segment content-hash computation and verification: dispatches to XXH3-128, CRC32C, or SHAKE-256 based on SegmentHeader.checksum_algo, with constant-time comparison.

nodes.name: compute_xxh3_128
nodes.summary: Computes the XXH3-128 hash (default, ~50 GB/s) over a byte slice.

nodes.name: compute_crc32c
nodes.summary: Computes legacy CRC32C; retained for backward compatibility before upgrading to XXH3-128.

nodes.name: compute_shake256_128
nodes.summary: Computes cryptographic SHAKE-256 truncated to 128 bits (~300 MB/s).

nodes.name: compute_content_hash
nodes.summary: Dispatches to the correct hash algorithm based on the algo identifier and returns the 16-byte content hash.

nodes.name: verify_content_hash
nodes.summary: Constant-time check that a payload matches the content_hash declared in its SegmentHeader.

nodes.name: hot_seg_codec.rs
nodes.summary: HOT_SEG codec: writes/reads the most-accessed vectors with co-located neighbor lists in a 64-byte-aligned row-major layout for cache locality.

nodes.name: HotHeader
nodes.summary: HOT_SEG header describing entry count, dtype, dim, and neighbor-list width for the hot vector cache.

nodes.name: HotEntry
nodes.summary: Single hot-cache entry pairing a vector with its neighbor id list, padded to 64-byte alignment.

nodes.name: write_hot_seg
nodes.summary: Serializes a HotHeader plus a slice of HotEntries into an aligned byte buffer suitable for HOT_SEG payload.

nodes.name: read_hot_header
nodes.summary: Parses a HotHeader from the start of a HOT_SEG payload and returns the header plus consumed byte count.

nodes.name: read_hot_entries
nodes.summary: Reads all HotEntry records from a HOT_SEG payload using the previously-parsed HotHeader.
